title: hypericum uliginosum var. pratense
intro: Hypericum uliginosum var. pratense, also known as marsh St. John's wort, is a plant species within the Hypericum genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and ability to thrive in wet environments. The medicinal properties of marsh St. John's wort include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce stress, anxiety, and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve wound healing. Marsh St. John's wort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health issues.
